sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26970" key="di/kormos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐ´-κορμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n26970.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with two trunks,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δένδρον</foreign> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> l. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:5:74" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.74</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
